'''A3''' was an asteroid in the [[Halmad system/Legends|Halmad system]]. It was the location of [[Tonheld Mining Corporation]]'s abandoned [[Site A3]], which [[Wraith Squadron]] took over to use as [[Hawk-bat Base]] in [[7 ABY/Legends|7.5 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Iron Fist (unabridged audiobook)}}
